change.text: Complete migration from XML layouts to Jetpack Compose
Redesigned entire app with Material Design 3
New modern signature screen with improved canvas and controls
Added customizable canvas backgrounds (solid colors and textures)
New color picker with 15 predefined colors
Save signatures in PNG format (transparent or white background)
Share signatures directly from the app
New Files screen to manage saved signatures
Quick actions: view, share, and delete signatures
New Settings screen with improved organization
Configure stroke width (minimum and maximum)
Auto-delete signatures on exit option
New navigation drawer with quick access to all features
Changelog screen to view version history
Social media links (GitHub, LinkedIn, Telegram, Twitter)
Floating Action Button for quick access to signature options
Modern bottom sheets for actions and configurations
Improved visual feedback with snackbar notifications
Support for Android 8 to Android 15
Optimized storage permissions handling for all Android versions
Improved app icon with adaptive design
Multi-language support: English, Spanish, Portuguese, French, German, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Russian, Hindi, Indonesian, Turkish, Vietnamese
Migrated to Kotlin DSL for Gradle configuration
Type-safe navigation system for better stability
Updated dependency injection system (Koin)
Optimized image loading with Coil library
Converted images to WebP format for reduced app size
Updated all dependencies to latest versions
Added code quality tools (Detekt)
Fixed crashes when saving signatures
Fixed file sharing on modern Android versions
Fixed permissions issues on Android 10+
Removed old XML-based UI
Removed deprecated fragments and activities
Removed unused animations and resources
Added GDPR consent dialog for privacy compliance
Added support for Android 14
Added support for Android 12L
Added dark theme support

Added feedback and suggestions feature
Improved swipe gesture options
